hero.title: Driver Logbook
hero.description: Record personal driving trips, vehicles, odometer readings, purposes, locations, and distance summaries from your own driving records.
points: Record trips with odometer and purpose details
Review distance, duration, and purpose summaries

flow.title: Vehicles -> Trips -> Insights
steps: Add vehicles you want to include in your personal log
Record trip date, times, odometer readings, purpose, route notes, and distance
Review recent trips, vehicle distance, purpose totals, and monthly driving summaries

differences.title: A personal driving history
differences.description: Driver Logbook focuses on user-entered trip records and summaries. It is not an official, commercial, or regulatory compliance logbook.

items.title: Vehicle list
items.description: Maintain a simple vehicle roster with registration nickname, odometer unit, archive status, and notes.

items.title: Trip entries
items.description: Capture each trip with date, time, odometer values, purpose, start location, destination, and notes.

items.title: Driving review
items.description: Summarize distance by month, vehicle, and purpose using only stored trip records.

feel.title: A calm driving journal
feel.description: The workflow is built for quick personal record keeping and later review, not navigation, fleet operations, or compliance certification.

items.title: Fast trip capture
items.description: The trip form keeps the expected driving log fields together.

items.title: Odometer-aware
items.description: Distance can be calculated from start and end odometer readings when both are provided.

items.title: Personal only
items.description: Summaries are informational and do not certify legal driving hours or official logbook compliance.

audiences.title: Who uses Driver Logbook
audiences.description: The app is for individuals and households who want a searchable personal driving history.

items.title: Personal drivers
items.description: Keep a history of day-to-day trips and purposes.

items.title: Households
items.description: Track personal vehicle use across multiple vehicles.

items.title: Record keepers
items.description: Review mileage, duration, and trip purpose trends without fleet-management complexity.

resourceSection.title: Driver logbook essentials
resourceSection.description: The app focuses on records the user can verify from odometer readings and trip notes.

items.title: Vehicles
items.description: Vehicle name, manufacturer, model, year, registration nickname, odometer unit, and notes.

items.title: Trips
items.description: Trip date, start/end time, start/end odometer, distance, purpose, locations, and notes.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Recent trips, longest trip, monthly distance, vehicle distance, and purpose summaries.

groupedSection.title: From trip entry to driving history
groupedSection.description: Driver Logbook keeps trip recording and trip review in one simple workflow.

items.name: Vehicle
items.description: Select the vehicle before saving each trip.

items.name: Trip details
items.description: Record purpose, time, odometer, distance, and route notes.

items.name: Purpose patterns
items.description: Compare driving distance and trip counts by purpose.

technicalSection.title: Built as an isolated mini app
technicalSection.description: Driver Logbook follows the Ansiversa mini-app pattern with its own database, API routes, overview metadata, and workflow pages.
items: Coming-soon catalog status preserved until manual verification approves launch.

finalCta.title: Open Driver Logbook
finalCta.description: Start with trip records, then review vehicles and insights.
